web.description: Midtown Park by Proper: a 5-acre destination in the heart of Miami. Discover designer residences, upscale shopping, dining & offices.
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/#content)

[The Masterplan](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/the-master-plan/)

[Proper Hospitality](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/proper-hospitality/)

[The Residences](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/the-residences/)

[Amenities & Services](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/amenities-and-services/)

[The Neighborhood](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/the-neighborhood/)

[The Visionaries](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/the-visionaries/)

## The Grass is   _Greener Here_

Five thoughtfully programmed acres in the heart of Midtown, connecting the energy of Wynwood, the edge of the Design District, and the calm of Edgewater. With generous green space, inspired architecture, and a dynamic mix of residences, hospitality, and offices, Midtown Park is a new blueprint for city living in Miami.

![](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/home-illustration.png?fit=952%2C659&quality=80&ssl=1)

“There is a New Midtown in Midtown”.

Carlos Rosso, FOUNDER AND CEO OF ROSSO DEVELOPMENT

Tower

0

Designer Residences

140

Ultra Luxury Penthouses

0

SQFT of Amenity Space

25K

SQFT of Retail Space

60K

Padel Courts

0

There is a New Midtown in Midtown

Enjoyable Shaded Paseos

![Shaded paseo at Midtown Park, featuring upscale shops, gourmet restaurants, and a patterned walkway.](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/e34d8792-571a-4eff-9b05-6064b18c2fb1.jpg?fit=330%2C434&quality=89&ssl=1)

Neighborhood Plazas & Parks

![Neighborhood park at Midtown Park, Miami, part of a five-acre master-planned destination, with green space and outdoor seating.](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/NQS_CARLOS-ROSSO_MIDTOWN-CENTRAL_VIEW-13_PARQUE-01_ER_OP2.jpg?fit=330%2C434&quality=89&ssl=1)

Public Monumental Art

![Modern yellow sculptural chair, a public art installation near Midtown Park Miami.](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Colin-Selig-1.jpg?fit=330%2C434&quality=89&ssl=1)

Designer Residences

![Midtown Park: luxury condo in Miami with massive floor-to-ceiling windows, open living space, designer lighting, and terrace overlooking Midtown Miami.](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/CARLOS-ROSSO-MIDTOWN-PARK-TOWER1-PH-VF-cam02-001.jpg?fit=330%2C434&quality=89&ssl=1)

Boutique Office Spaces

![Woman working remotely in a stylish boutique office space in Midtown Miami - Midtown Park.](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/unlicensed_stills_239716_lauren-jones.jpg?fit=330%2C434&quality=89&ssl=1)

Acclaimed Chef Restaurants

![Overhead view of gourmet dishes at a Miami restaurant near Midtown Park by Proper, showcasing a curated dining experience.](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/SMP_HiRes_LifestylePeople_47.jpg?fit=330%2C434&quality=89&ssl=1)

Prime Designer Shopping

![Women with shopping bags walking along a shaded paseo at Midtown Park Miami, featuring designer shopping storefronts, trees, and a patterned walkway.](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/WhatsApp-Image-2025-01-31-at-17.51.31-1.jpg?fit=330%2C434&quality=89&ssl=1)

Charming Sidewalk Cafes

![Charming sidewalk cafe overlooking an outdoor plaza with blooming trees and buildings at Midtown Park by Proper.](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/NQS_CARLOS-ROSSO_MIDTOWN-CENTRAL_VIEW-14_PARQUE-02_SD_CP.jpg?fit=330%2C434&quality=89&ssl=1)

State-of-the-art Fitness Center

![Woman holding hand weights in Midtown Park's state-of-the-art fitness center in Midtown Miami.](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/AUP_HiRes_LifestylePeople_25.jpg?fit=330%2C434&quality=89&ssl=1)

Padel by Ultra

![ultra-padel](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/ultra-padel.jpg?fit=330%2C434&quality=89&ssl=1)

Midtown Park By Proper is a vibrant five-acre, 24/7 master-planned destination at the heart of Midtown Miami, seamlessly connecting the dynamic neighborhoods of the Design District, Wynwood, and Edgewater. This mixed-use development is anchored by thoughtfully designed public spaces and features a unique blend of office spaces, hospitality, upscale residences, and more—a hub of creativity, community, and modern living.

[Explore The Master Plan](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/the-master-plan/)

![](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/midtown-park-homepage-2.jpg?fit=710%2C885&quality=89&ssl=1)

## The Brand

At Midtown Park By Proper, each space embodies our signature balance of expressive design and soulful hospitality. With 12 award-winning destinations across the country, and more on the way, By Proper blends modern luxury with a deep sense of place, creating experiences that feel as local as they do elevated.

[Explore the Brand](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/proper-hospitality/)

_“Passion fuels our pursuit of exceptional spaces, places that bring people together, inspire creativity, and embody modern living. Midtown Park is more than a destination; it’s a community designed for connection, discovery, and a life well lived. Anything less just wouldn’t be proper.”_

Brian De Lowe, CO FOUNDER / PRESIDENT, PROPER HOSPITALITY

![](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/midtown-park-homepage-splash-1.jpg?fit=1677%2C1028&quality=89&ssl=1)

## The Residences

Proper Living

_in the Heart of Midtown_

From the art-filled lobby to the rooftop retreat, Midtown Park By Proper delivers a refined, residential experience grounded in both design and intention. With elevated amenities and signature service, every detail is designed to meet you where you are, and move with the way you live.

[Explore The Residences](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/the-residences/)

[Download Floor Plans](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/the-residences/#floorplans)

![](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/midtown-park-penthouse-1.png?fit=1502%2C2048&quality=80&ssl=1)

## The Neighborhood

The Center

_of Everything_

Perfectly placed between Wynwood, the Design District, and Edgewater, Midtown Park puts you at the heart of Miami’s creative and cultural pulse. Walk to what matters. Stay close to what moves you.

![](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/midtown-park-neighborhood-2025.png?fit=1863%2C1056&quality=80&ssl=1)

[Explore the Neighborhood](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/the-neighborhood/)

“Midtown Park is _Miami’s most significant urban development_, connecting the Design District and Wynwood through Midtown. _This is a new green pedestrian paradise with retail, resaurants, offices, and luxury residences._“

Bernardo Fort-Brescia, PRINCIPAL, ARQUITECTONICA

![](https://i0.wp.com/www.midtownparkbyproper.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/NQS_CARLOS-ROSSO_MIDTOWN_VIEW-17_PASAJE-PEATONAL-01_FI_OP2.jpg?fit=2560%2C1568&quality=89&ssl=1)

## Connect with us

[@midtownparkbyproper](https://www.instagram.com/midtownparkbyproper/)

[I AGREE, VISIT](https://www.midtownparkbyproper.com/)

# MIDTOWN PARK

## BY PROPERBY PROPER

## **Discover a new expression of luxury living in the heart of Miami.**

Midtown Park Residences by Proper marks our debut residential offering in the city—a design-forward collection of homes rising within a $2 billion mixed-use destination at the crossroads of the Design District, Wynwood, and Midtown. Developed in collaboration with Rosso Development and a visionary team of designers—Arquitectonica, Meyer Davis Studio, and Naturalficial—this 28-story tower reflects Proper’s signature sophistication and ethos of elevated, everyday living.

Residents will enjoy over 40,000 square feet of private amenity space, including a lush tropical pool deck, curated social lounges, and immersive wellness offerings like a state-of-the-art fitness center, yoga garden, spa facilities, and a rooftop pickleball court. Every detail—from design to daily service—embodies the Proper lifestyle: culturally connected, thoughtfully curated, and distinctly inspiring. Now selling.

Be among the first to access exclusive preview pricing.

- [Explore residences](https://www.properhotel.com/midtown-park/#midtown-park)

Upcoming Events

![SMP Palma](https://www.properhotel.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/SMP_1-1_Palma_2-336x336.jpg)

Apr

5th

## Easter Brunch at Palma

Apr 05, 2026

11:30 am - 4:00 pm

Join us for Easter Brunch specials in Palma Lounge.

[RESERVE TABLE](https://www.opentable.com/booking/experiences-availability?rid=1042726&restref=1042726&experienceId=675023&utm_source=external&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=shared "RESERVE TABLE")

![Brunch at Palma](https://www.properhotel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/SMP_1-1_FB_64-336x336.jpg)

## Weekend Brunch

Sat & Sun \| 11:30AM-2:00PM \| Palma Lounge

Dive into the weekend with a casual brunch in Palma’s art-filled gathering space. Enjoy seasonal dishes paired with signature drinks every Saturday and Sunday.

[Reserve Palma](https://www.opentable.com/r/palma-reservations-santa-monica?restref=1042726&lang=en-US&ot_source=Restaurant%20website&ot_campaign=Happenings "Reserve Palma")
